honesty_statement: This is a post-outcome interpretation firewall, not prospective preregistration. Outcomes already exist. Its purpose is to prevent cherry-picking, post-hoc subgroup selection, metric switching, and unsupported trading conclusions.

canonical_denominators.ambiguity_handling: AMBIGUOUS_SAME_BAR is never TP_FIRST or SL_FIRST and remains reported
canonical_denominators.unresolved_handling: NO_RESOLUTION is never a win or loss and remains reported

consistency_definitions.h24_h48_material_conflict: both full-population denominators meet minimum, Wilson intervals do not overlap, and H24/H48 point estimates are on opposite sides of 0.40
consistency_definitions.direction_material_contradiction: both direction denominators meet minimum, their Wilson intervals do not overlap, and their point estimates are on opposite sides of 0.40
consistency_definitions.year_material_contradiction: two or more year denominators meet minimum, one year Wilson upper bound is <= 0.40, another year Wilson lower bound is > 0.40

REJECT_CURRENT_CANDIDATE: or H48 and H24 full-population point estimates are both below 0.40 with adequate samples and no h24_h48_material_conflict
or direction_material_contradiction or year_material_contradiction makes the combined frozen candidate unsuitable
INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: any required full/direction/year denominator is below its minimum
or H48 Wilson interval overlaps 0.40 and evidence does not meet advancement conditions
or source-data limitations prevent stable disposition
RESEARCH_MORE_WITH_NEW_HYPOTHESIS: a frozen structural consistency check identifies one specific non-trading research question
the question requires a completely new separately frozen hypothesis

precedence: REJECT_CURRENT_CANDIDATE when its conditions are satisfied
INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE when rejection is not satisfied and advancement conditions are not all met
RESEARCH_MORE_WITH_NEW_HYPOTHESIS only when a specific frozen structural question is documented without retaining a favorable subgroup
ELIGIBLE_FOR_COST_AWARE_OFFLINE_DIAGNOSTIC_DESIGN only when all listed conditions are met

future_fo_scope: Apply this contract to already-verified FL rows only; report every mandatory population and select exactly one disposition. Do not rerun or alter outcomes.
